Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 186 

PRVDR_NUM 

LABEL: Provider Number 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the provider identification number. 

The first two digits indicate the state where the provider is located, using the SSA state codes; the 
middle two characters indicate the type of provider; and the last two digits are used as a counter for the 
number of providers within that state and type of provider (i.e., this is a
